# erase()

**Instance Method**

Clears the view using the current erase color.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func erase()
```

## Managing the Erase Color

- **eraseColor()**: Retrieves the current color used to erase the view.
- **setEraseColor(_:)**: Sets the color used to erase the view.
